mapper.select:
SELECT A.CTKEY , COUNT(1) AS TOTALCNT , COUNT(distinct C.ICKEY) AS ICKEYCNT , MAX(C.INSPECTFLAG) AS INSPECTFLAG FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_WA_DT B ,TWORK_INFO_OB_DT C WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY
AND A.WAHDKEY = B.WAHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND C.WORKINGYN = 'N' AND C.WKSTATUS < '49'
AND A.WAHDKEY IN
#{wahdkeyList}
GROUP BY A.CTKEY

SELECT A.CTKEY ,D.OBHDKEY ,D.OBDTKEY ,D.ICKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_WA_DT B ,TWORK_INFO_OB_HD C ,TWORK_INFO_OB_DT D WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY
AND A.WAHDKEY = B.WAHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND C.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND C.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND C.OBHDKEY = D.OBHDKEY AND D.WORKINGYN = 'N' AND D.WKSTATUS < '49'
AND A.WAHDKEY IN
#{wahdkeyList}
ORDER BY D.ICKEY, C.OBPRIORITY ASC

SELECT B.CTKEY ,B.OBHDKEY ,B.OBDTKEY ,B.ICKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.OBHDKEY = B.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC C ON B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = C.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT D ON B.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND B.ICUTKEY = D.ICUTKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.WAHDKEY = E.WAHDKEY AND A.OBHDKEY = E.OBHDKEY AND A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_STORE G ON A.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND A.STORE_KEY = G.STORE_KEY AND A.DCKEY = G.DCKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_AC H ON B.CTKEY = H.CTKEY AND B.ACKEY = H.ACKEY AND B.OWKEY = H.OWKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_INFO_LOADPLAN I ON A.CTKEY = I.CTKEY AND A.LOGGRPCD = I.LOGGRPCD AND A.OBHDKEY = I.OBHDKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_LCXIC J ON C.CTKEY = J.CTKEY AND C.OWKEY = J.OWKEY AND C.ICKEY = J.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICGR L ON C.CTKEY = L.CTKEY AND C.OWKEY = L.OWKEY AND C.ICGRKEY = L.ICGRKEY AND C.ICGRTYPE = L.ICGRTYPE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW N ON A.OWKEY = N.OWKEY WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND B.WORKINGYN = 'N' AND D.CLOSDATE >= #{closdate} AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION} ORDER BY B.ICKEY, A.OBPRIORITY ASC

SELECT A.WAHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_WA_DT B ,TWORK_INFO_OB_DT C WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY
AND A.WAHDKEY = B.WAHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND C.WKSTATUS < '40'
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
GROUP BY A.CTKEY, A.WAHDKEY

SELECT A.CTKEY ,C.PIDTKEY ,C.EXQTY - C.CFQTY AS QTY ,C.EXQTY ,1 AS ICUTQTY ,C.OBHDKEY ,C.OBDTKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_WA_DT B ,TWORK_INFO_PI_DT C ,TWORK_MST_LC D WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY
AND A.WAHDKEY = B.WAHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND C.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND C.FR_LCKEY = D.LCKEY
AND D.ARKEY NOT IN ('DPS', 'DAS')
AND C.WKSTATUS < '90' AND A.WAHDKEY IN
#{wahdkeyList}
ORDER BY C.IVATKEY ASC, C.ICKEY ASC

SELECT A.WAHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_WA_DT B ,TWORK_INFO_OB_DT C ,TWORK_INFO_PI_DT D WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY
AND A.WAHDKEY = B.WAHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND C.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND C.OBHDKEY = D.OBHDKEY AND C.OBDTKEY = D.OBDTKEY AND D.WKSTATUS < '90'
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
GROUP BY A.CTKEY, A.WAHDKEY

SELECT A.WAHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_WA_DT B ,TWORK_INFO_OB_DT C ,TWORK_INFO_PI_DT D WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY
AND A.WAHDKEY = B.WAHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND C.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND C.OBHDKEY = D.OBHDKEY AND C.OBDTKEY = D.OBDTKEY AND D.WKSTATUS = '00'
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
GROUP BY A.CTKEY, A.WAHDKEY

SELECT A.WAHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_WA_DT B ,TWORK_INFO_OB_DT C ,TWORK_INFO_PI_DT D WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY
AND A.WAHDKEY = B.WAHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND C.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND C.OBHDKEY = D.OBHDKEY AND C.OBDTKEY = D.OBDTKEY AND D.WKSTATUS = '90'
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
GROUP BY A.CTKEY, A.WAHDKEY

SELECT A.WAHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_WA_HD A ,TWORK_INFO_WA_DT B ,TWORK_INFO_OB_DT C WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY
AND A.WAHDKEY = B.WAHDKEY AND B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND B.OBHDKEY = C.OBHDKEY AND C.WKSTATUS < '90'
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
GROUP BY A.CTKEY, A.WAHDKEY
